channel.title: Saxon on XSLT Playground
channel.description: Recent content in Saxon on XSLT Playground

item.title: XSLT 3.0 new features: what changed from 2.0
item.description: XSLT 3.0 is a significant step beyond 2.0. If you are running Saxon on the backend — as XSLT Playground does — you have access to the full 3.0 feature set today. This post covers the additions that matter most in practice and shows how to try each one directly in the playground. Streaming The most impactful change in 3.0 is streaming. In earlier versions, the processor loads the entire source document into memory before any template can run.
